name: Vida
description_short: Vida Lakewood Ranch is a luxury apartment community in Bradenton, Florida, not a consumer finance company offering payday alternatives or lending services.
description_long: Vida Lakewood Ranch is a residential apartment community located at 11109 Vida Circle in Bradenton, Florida 34211, situated within the Lakewood Ranch master-planned community. The property is marketed as a luxury rental apartment complex featuring direct-entry units with high-end finishes. Based on available website content, this is a real estate rental property, not a financial services company offering payday alternatives, loans, credit services, or any consumer finance products. The website contains no information about lending, credit products, financial services, APRs, loan terms, or any payday alternative offerings. The categorization as a 'payday-alternative' lender appears to be a database error. Vida Lakewood Ranch operates as a residential property management company offering lease agreements for apartment homes. The property markets itself as Florida's #1 rated apartment community as of 2023 and emphasizes luxury living amenities. No financial services are mentioned or offered on their website. This company should not be listed in any consumer finance category and appears to have been incorrectly indexed.
pros: Located in Lakewood Ranch, America's top-ranked multigenerational community since 2018
High-end finishes including granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and wood-style flooring
Comprehensive amenities: resort-style pool, dog parks, fitness center, clubhouse, walking trails
Direct-entry apartment design with convenient parking outside units
Pet-friendly policy allowing up to 2 pets per home
Prime location near shopping, dining, and entertainment at The Marketplace at Heritage Harbour
cons: Not a financial services company—cannot provide loans or payday alternatives
Website contains no lending terms, rates, or consumer finance information
Completely miscategorized in consumer finance database
No emergency cash access or credit-building products offered
best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
diagnosis: Vida Lakewood Ranch is a residential apartment community in Florida, not a consumer finance company. This listing is miscategorized and should be removed from CreditDoc's financial services database entirely.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
